name: Creamy Chicken Primavera
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter.
2. Add the chicken and cook until no longer pink.
3. Add the pasta and vegetables and water. Cover and cook over medium heat for 7-9 minutes until the vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the sour cream; heat thoroughly.
5. Serve 4 servings.
